title: stelis bicolor
intro: Stelis bicolor, also known as the two-colored orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis bicolor include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. Stelis bicolor can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often made by steeping the plant's leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent.
